## Summary

- What changed, why it changed, and which dated feature branch this PR belongs to.

## Validation

- List the commands you ran, in order.
- Include focused checks and the full release gate when applicable.
- Note any independent validation or reviewer follow-up.

## Manual checks

- Describe the user flows you exercised.
- Attach screenshots for UI changes when relevant.
- Mention anything you could not verify automatically.

## Notes

- Call out rollout constraints, data migrations, or date-specific commit history if relevant.
